name: drawellipse
creator: ews31415
description: Draw an ellipse given the length of x and y radii. If x and y are equal, a circle is drawn. The screen is set up to fit the proportion of the 320 x 220 screen. The vertical axis ranges from y = -44 to y = 44 while the horizontal axis ranges from x = -64 to x = 64. The ellipse is centered at (0,0).
